subject: feat(station): add price history chart (last 30 days)
body:
Bar chart on station detail showing price trends over the last 30 days.
Built with plain React Native Views (no chart library dependency).
Fuel type selector chips when station has multiple fuel types.

Includes usePriceHistory hook that queries price_history table with
30-day window filter.

Tags: station, pricing, chart, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: station-detail
Semver: minor
